query: I trained a ResNet-50 on CIFAR-10 and clean test accuracy is 94.3%. A regulator is asking for an adversarial robustness number under L-infinity epsilon = 8/255. Walk me through what to run and what to report.
expected_behavior: Names the canonical attack stack as FGSM (weak baseline) + PGD-20 (mid-effort) + AutoAttack-standard (the canonical benchmark / leaderboard number), in that order of increasing strength

Requires an explicit threat-model declaration that specifies the norm (Linf), the epsilon value WITH UNITS (8/255 for [0,1]-scaled pixels), white-box vs black-box, and untargeted vs targeted — before any attack runs

Specifies that robust accuracy must be reported as a fraction of clean accuracy on the SAME attacked subset (not the full test set), and that the report must include the strict monotone sanity check robust_acc(AutoAttack) ≤ robust_acc(PGD-20) ≤ robust_acc(FGSM)
